recommendations.title: The Expendables 2
recommendations.overview: Mr. Church reunites the Expendables for what should be an easy paycheck, but when one of their men is murdered on the job, their quest for revenge puts them deep in enemy territory and up against an unexpected threat.

recommendations.title: Stratton
recommendations.overview: A British Special Boat Service commando tracks down an international terrorist cell.

recommendations.title: Gun Shy
recommendations.overview: A mega-platinum, aging rock star's supermodel wife is abducted by pirates while vacationing in Chile.

recommendations.title: Skyfire
recommendations.overview: Tianhuo Island is as beautiful as a paradise. It almost makes people forget that it is located in the "Ring of Fire" the world-famous Pacific Rim volcanic belt. The volcano erupts, and the fates of the people on the island are entangled.

recommendations.title: Old Guy
recommendations.overview: Stuck at a dead end but vying for the love of spunky club manager Anata, aging contract killer Danny Dolinski is thrilled when The Company pulls him back in the field, but only to train Gen Z newcomer Wihlborg, a prodigy assassin with an attitude.

recommendations.title: Wild Card
recommendations.overview: When a Las Vegas bodyguard with lethal skills and a gambling problem gets in trouble with the mob, he has one last play… and it's all or nothing.

recommendations.title: Lara Croft: Tomb Raider - The Cradle of Life
recommendations.overview: Off the coast of the volcanic island of Santorini, the intrepid archaeologist Lara Croft makes the unexpected discovery of a pulsating golden orb able to guide its holder to the mythical Pandora's Box. As the legendary artifact contains ancient myste

recommendations.title: Dungeons & Dragons: Honor Among Thieves
recommendations.overview: A charming thief and a band of unlikely adventurers undertake an epic heist to retrieve a lost relic, but things go dangerously awry when they run afoul of the wrong people.

recommendations.title: Bride Hard
recommendations.overview: Sam is a secret agent whose toughest mission to date is pleasing her bride-to-be best friend at a lavish destination wedding. When a team of mercenaries crashes the party and takes the guests hostage, Sam is thrown into a fight unlike any before — on

recommendations.title: The Mechanic
